# Transcrição: 9. Orphan Owners

## [00:00 - 00:49]

The next list is going to be orphan owners. Do you know what an orphan owner is? An orphan owner is basically an owner that doesn't have a mommy or a daddy or both, okay? You're a mommy and you're daddy now. You're basically going to orphan this owner. You're going to say, hey, we want to adopt you. I want to take care of you. These are people in your company, customers that have been sold by your customer, but no one is any longer representing that file, that case, or that customer. If you work in a law firm, I promise you, you have clients that you did business for years ago and nobody's taking care of them. They're not calling them. They're not contacting them. No birthday cards, no love, nothing. You're the new orphan papa, okay? Make a list of everyone. It might be as simple as going to your management team. Where can I get a list of everyone that's done business with us that no longer has a representative taking care of that account?
